name: Date or Raisin Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop pitted dates and substitute for raisins if desired.
2. Mix cereal and milk in a bowl until most of the milk is absorbed.
3. Grease 12 2-1/2-inch muffin cups and preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
4. In a medium-sized bowl, sift flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar together.
5. Add dates/raisins and nuts; mix until combined with the dry ingredients.
6. Beat egg and oil into the soaked cereal mixture using a fork until well incorporated.
7. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredient mixture and stir only until just moistened.
8. Fill each prepared muffin cup about half to two-thirds full with batter.
9. Bake for 30 minutes, or until golden brown and firm when tested with a toothpick.
10. Remove from pan and serve warm with butter and jelly or preserves.
